Tests the behavior of the Math.pow function with negative base and infinite exponent.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion statement that tests the behavior of the `Math.pow` function in JavaScript. It checks if raising a negative number, `-5`, to the power of `Infinity` results in `Infinity`. This test is likely part of a broader test suite to verify the correctness of mathematical operations in a JavaScript environment. The assertion uses the `assert` function to ensure that the expected result matches the actual result, which helps identify potential issues in the implementation of the `Math.pow` function.
